title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.612 - Right to file motion to dismiss — jury trial
text:
513.612.  Right to file motion to dismiss — jury trial. — Any party may bring one motion to dismiss at any time and such motion shall be heard and ruled on within ten days.  Any party may demand a jury trial.
(L. 1986 S.B. 450 § 8) 
Effective 3-17-86
